name: ATEX AI Gateway
description: One API Key to access 6 AI models (DeepSeek, GPT-4o, Claude). Pay-per-use, OpenAI compatible. MCP protocol support. Web search at 5 ATEX/call. Agent self-discovery via /.well-known/agent.json. Budget management for agents.

tools.name: chat
tools.description: Chat with 6+ AI models (DeepSeek, GPT-4o, Claude) via a single API key

tools.name: web_search
tools.description: Search the web for real-time information at 5 ATEX per request

tools.name: check_balance
tools.description: Check your ATEX token balance and usage

tools.name: list_models
tools.description: List all available AI models and their pricing

tools.name: list_services
tools.description: Browse 40+ services in the ATEX marketplace

tools.name: set_budget
tools.description: Set spending budget limits for your agent (daily/per-action/monthly)

tools.name: check_budget
tools.description: Check current budget status and spending breakdown
